TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Takenawan, title = Takenawan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Takenawan} }

S.FORM: Malalukay caay kasulep, matukaay caay kabecul u dietu nu Sakizaya
S.PHON: mar~ɾar~ɾukaj ʦaaj kasur~ɾəp, matukaaj ʦaaj kabəʦur~ɾ u diətu nu sakizaja
S.FORM: Malalukay caay kasulep, matukaay caay kabecul u dietu nu Sakizaya
